title: Israel, Iran trade strikes as U.S. says it is pausing attacks on energy targets
summary_full: Four Persian Gulf states reported fresh missile and drone threats from Iran, as Israel pledged to keep up its attacks in Iran and Lebanon “with full force.”
summary_public: Four Persian Gulf states reported fresh missile and drone threats from Iran, as Israel pledged to keep up its attacks in Iran and Lebanon “with full force.”

LB.label: negative
LB.evidence: Israel pledged to keep up its attacks in Lebanon
